message:
fix(combinator): replace TOCTOU-prone fetch_sub with CAS loop in Bulkhead::process_queue

process_queue loaded available_permits then did fetch_sub without verifying
the value hadn't changed, creating a race with concurrent try_acquire that
could underflow the u32 permit counter (wrapping to u32::MAX). Replace with
a compare_exchange loop matching the pattern already used in try_acquire.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
